zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD在1735附近窄幅震荡，整体呈弱势横盘结构，短期多空动能均显不足，

均线方面价格持续压制于SMA20下方1744，短期均线走平，反弹力度有限，MACD虽微正但动能减弱

支撑关注1730一线及1720整数关口，上方阻力1744与1750区域，突破前难改震荡格局

操作建议以高抛低吸为主，未放量突破前谨慎追多，等待区间确认后再顺势布局

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
(ETH/USD) is currently moving in a tight consolidation phase after a prolonged sideways drift near the lower boundary of its recent range. Price action around 1734 suggests market indecision, with minimal volatility and lack of directional conviction. The broader short-term trend leans mildly bearish as price remains below the 20-day SMA, indicating sellers still have slight control despite absence of strong downside momentum.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but slightly bullish-to-neutral bias, though confirmation is limited by incomplete signals. MACD reading at 0.9908 remains marginally positive, suggesting weak upward momentum but not enough strength to confirm a sustained trend. With SMA(20) at 1744.15 acting as overhead resistance, price trading below it reinforces a short-term bearish structure. RSI is unavailable, so momentum confirmation relies primarily on price structure and moving average behavior rather than oscillator signals.

Immediate support for Ethereum sits near the recent intraday low around 1734, with a minor floor extending toward 1730. Beneath this zone, stronger support levels are located at 1720 and the psychological 1700 mark, where buyers may re-emerge. On the upside, initial resistance aligns with the 20-day SMA at 1744.15, a key dynamic barrier. Further resistance is seen at 1760, followed by 1785, where profit-taking pressure could intensify.

Given the compressed price action, a range-bound strategy appears most appropriate for short-term traders. Buying near support around 1730–1734 with tight risk control may offer favorable risk-reward setups in current conditions. Selling into resistance near 1744–1760 can also be considered, especially if momentum fails to improve. Overall bias remains neutral-to-slightly bearish until a decisive breakout above SMA or breakdown below 1730 occurs.
